g.text: Must be logged in to receive notifications
Account must have notifications enabled for post interactions
Must be published and accessible to other users
Must not contain sensitive user information
If disabled, no notification is sent for that post
Sends notifications via email, push, or in-app
Stores and retrieves notification preferences per user and post
Handles user login and session management
+commentOnPost(user: User, post: Post, content: String): void
+updatePreference(user: User, post: Post, enabled: boolean): void
